description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline featuring multiple gables and dormers. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, bay windows, and decorative trim, giving it a stately appearance. The house is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including several trees and shrubs. On one side, there is a spacious outdoor patio area leading to a rectangular swimming pool enclosed by a metal railing. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some featuring multi-pane designs. The overall style blends traditional and colonial architectural elements, with a focus on elegance and comfort.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a covered porch, bay windows, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, bay windows, and landscaped trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended patio, balcony, and the start of the pool area with visible railing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full swimming pool, patio area, and the back facade with large windows and balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, additional landscaping, and the pointed roof feature.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with bay windows and multi-pane designs
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps, and decorative trim, flanked by bay windows.
